prestazioni: Engine swap to 1UZ-FE V8 (4.0L, 32-valve, quad-cam) with a custom HKS 264°/264° camshaft profile, Tomei 1.5mm oversized titanium retainers, and a GReddy T88-34D turbocharger (1.25 A/R turbine housing) running 18 psi on a custom-tuned Haltech Elite 2500 ECU with flex-fuel ethanol mapping for 450+ whp on E85

Full drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken twin-plate clutch (280mm) with a reinforced flywheel, Cusco 1.5-way mechanical LSD for the JZX100-series Crown Wagon rear differential, and a custom 4.875 final drive ratio for improved acceleration

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (custom valved for the Crown Wagon’s 1,600kg weight), Whiteline adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for the rear trailing arms to eliminate compliance
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (JZX100-specific, not the generic version) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler for aggressive stance and aero balance

Custom 3-piece Work Meister S1 3P wheels (18x10 +15 front, 18x11 +25 rear) with 245/40R18 and 275/35R18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires, paired with DBA 5000 Series rotors and AP Racing CP8650 calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) for track-ready braking

Full interior rewrap in Alcantara (Autostyle Japan) with custom Recaro SP-G seats (JZX100-specific mounting brackets), a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel, and a custom roll cage (Sparco Pro2000) integrated with a full bolt-in harness bar for rigidity and safety
